phase_name: sessions 17-20 — Li criterion complete, Connes normalization gap

completed_tasks.name: S17-19: Li criterion fully explored — Gamma proved, zeta bound = RH
S19-20: Connes paper formulas extracted (W_02 eq4.2, W_p eq4.3, W_R eq4.4, xi_hat eq5.25)
S20: 6 Connes scripts built (v1-v4 + weil + spectral), QW structure verified
S20: Identified normalization mismatch: Mellin vs Fourier, q-function factor

remaining_tasks.name: Resolve Connes normalization: trace V_n -> q(U_n,U_m) -> Psi#(F) conventions exactly
High-precision run: 200dp, N=120, exact W_R -> reproduce 10^{-60}
Write Li criterion preprint documenting S17-19 decomposition results

blockers.blocker: Connes W_R normalization: backed-out W_R(1,1) = -5.34 vs computed +0.99 — ~6 unit offset from q-function factor and Weil distribution conventions

human_actions_pending.action: Print/read arxiv:2511.22755 Section 2 (Lemma 2.3, q-function) and Section 3 (Psi#, kappa) to resolve normalization

decisions.decision: Connes implementation needs careful convention tracing, not just formula extraction
decisions.rationale: Six scripts built, each improving on the last. W_R has correct n-dependence but wrong normalization. Root cause is the chain V_n -> U_n -> q(U_n,U_m) -> F -> Psi#(F) where each step has specific conventions (kappa map, log vs mult, 1/sqrt(L) factors). Getting this right requires reading Sections 2-3 in full.

next_action: Either (1) carefully read Sections 2-3 of the paper to resolve conventions (most productive), or (2) write the Li criterion preprint (fully completed work), or (3) try a completely different Connes experiment (prolate wave operator UV spectrum).
context_notes: 16 scripts total. Li (10): li_criterion.py through li_zeta_bound.py. Connes (6): connes_weil.py, connes_spectral.py, connes_exact.py, connes_v2.py, connes_v3.py, connes_v4.py. Paper PDF saved locally at ~/.claude/.../webfetch-*.pdf. Key diagnostic: backed-out W_R vs computed W_R shows ~6 unit diagonal offset for n >= 1. Python: /c/Python313/python.exe.
